S04.meta: // SLIDE 04 — FIVE POINTS IN THE LOOP WHERE

data.title: FIVE POINTS IN THE LOOP WHERE GATES BELONG.
blocks: Tool and permission approval, before the task begins.
Plan approval, before execution begins.
Action approval, before high-risk or irreversible actions execute.
Verification, before the output is used.
External-effect gate, before the output reaches outside the system.
data.section: FIVE POINTS IN THE LOOP WHERE

Four Responses, Not Two — The four gate responses are approve, redirect, pause, and stop.
